reasoning: Heart silhouette is universally readable and instantly iconic even at 1x. The pixel art green outline with small orange/yellow sparkle dots delivers strong toy charm and friendly personality — sticker test: yes. On dark bg, white fill + colored outline creates excellent contrast and the glow reads as healing energy. On light/cream bg, the white interior blends slightly with the background, but the green outline edge rescues readability — marginal concern, not a fail. Edge cleanliness is good for pixel art style; deliberate pixelation reads as intentional not mushy. Shape is round, soft, non-aggressive. No silhouette confusion. Charm and clarity both meet threshold.
